title: pelargonium × markianum
intro: Pelargonium × markianum, also known as the Rose Geranium or Old Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family, specifically bred from Pelargonium roseum and Pelargonium capitatum. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit antimicrobial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits associated with Pelargonium × markianum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, improve sleep quality, and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the leaves of this plant are often used to create teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
